div.p: Structure: Recursive van Emde Boas Layout for Cache-Oblivious Search Trees. Address Space: 0x000 - 0x1FF (512 Bytes Total) Alignment: 64-byte Cache Line Optimized | {near: top-center}
offsets: { shape: sql_table style.stroke: transparent style.fill: transparent
div.h1: Visual boundary for the first 128B cluster

tr.td: Subtree clusters fit in L1/L2 cache lines (64B).
Reduced from $\log N$ in standard pointer-based BST.

ul.li: CL Alignment: Every subtree cluster of size 64B or 128B must be aligned to a 0x40 byte boundary to prevent Cache Line Straddling.
Prefetching: Modern CPU prefetchers (L1D/L2) detect the linear access pattern of bottom subtrees during range scans.
